title: Retail Sales Associate
description:
Retail Sales Associate - Join Asia's Leading Precious Metals & Bullion Dealer!

Why Join LPM Singapore?

We are a leader in the precious metals industry with the largest dealer network in the Asia Pacific region. We are a full-service precious metals trading company offering a wide array of internationally recognized bullion, proof commemorative coins and custom-minted items. We have experienced consistent year-on-year growth and have recently expanded with the opening of LPM Singapore.

We are a fast-growing company looking for a highly energetic, enthusiastic and fantastic local talent to join our expansion in Singapore. We offer fast-track career development opportunities and competitive remuneration to the right candidate.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Respond to customer enquiries via phone and email in a timely and professional manner
  • Support in-store retail sales and assist customers at the counter
  • Welcome, engage, and provide assistance to walk-in customers
  • Prepare and manage customer collection orders accurately and efficiently
  • Carry out customer verification and KYC procedures in accordance with company guidelines
  • Maintain a clean, organised, and presentable retail environment
  • Undertake additional sales or operational tasks as required to support the business

Experience & Qualifications:

  • At least one year of experience in a customer-facing retail or service-related role
  • Background knowledge or exposure to precious metals, bullion, or related industries is an advantage
  • Strong interpersonal and customer service skills with a professional demeanour
  • Comfortable using Microsoft Excel and other Microsoft Office applications
  • A collaborative team player with a proactive attitude and eagerness to develop
  • Clear verbal and written communication skills in English
  • Able to manage multiple tasks efficiently in a fast-paced work environment

Benefits of the Role:

  • Annual Wage Supplement equivalent to one month’s salary
  • Annual leave entitlement of up to 14 days
  • Access to a staff discount programme
  • Stable weekday work schedule from Monday to Friday, with no weekend shifts
  • Opportunity for career advancement within a growing Singapore operation supported by a publicly listed NYSE parent company

Apply Today!

If you are enthusiastic about retail sales and customer service and are looking to build a long-term career in a growing organisation, we encourage you to apply. Please submit your updated resume along with your expected salary details.

postedCompany.description: LPM Singapore is Asia's leading precious metals and bullion dealer. We offer a wide range of gold, silver and platinum products for investment as well as exclusive collectibles from top global mints. In addition, we offer our valued customers secure storage services to store their precious metals. We also buy back precious metals from our customers at highly competitive rates.
postedCompany.name: AM LPM SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
